prompt: Add CMD console login banner and Enter gate
note: Added the copyright/security notice and con0 availability banner after VVRP startup; CMD now waits for Enter before creating the interactive CLI prompt
decisions: Keep the login banner in CMD because it belongs to operator console interaction, not VVRP core lifecycle
Display CMD readiness and startup completion before the banner, then gate the CLI prompt on Enter
